location: Prospect Town, a ruined settlement in western Gravesite Plain south of the Cliffroad Terminus Site of Grace. It is a guaranteed one-time drop from the Bloodfiend enemies infesting the town (roughly 2 in the lower section, 6 more in the upper ruins).
tactics: From Cliffroad Terminus Site of Grace, head south into the ruined town; Bloodfiends are scattered through both the lower and upper sections.
Bloodfiends are fast, low-profile crawlers that lunge into bite/claw combos and stack bleed quickly when fought in groups — pull them into open ground rather than tight ruin corridors.
The Arm is a guaranteed drop from the group as a whole rather than a specific named enemy, so clear upward through the town if it doesn't drop early.
Don't confuse this with the much tougher optional superboss Chief Bloodfiend in Rivermouth Cave — that boss merely wields a similar-looking arm weapon and is unrelated to this drop.
lore: Little more than a dead bloodfiend's arm torn free and swung by its surviving kin as a crude club. A blood ritual sanctified the limb so it bursts with the stored blood inside whenever a heavy blow lands.

builds.name: Arcane Bleed Colossal
builds.why: Arcane carries the highest raw scaling on this weapon, and the Blood affinity adds a strong 83 bleed buildup on top, making it a natural Arcane/bleed pick.

builds.name: Quality Stance-Breaker
builds.why: Even unaffinitized, its heavy-attack blood splash adds bonus stance damage, so a plain STR/DEX quality build can use it purely to break poise.
